parts.text: Hello, my name is Alex Smith. I'd like to book an online meeting to discuss pensions. I am more interested in booking whichever will accept this Wednesday around 9am.

justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's time preferences throughout the conversation, querying the exact 9:00-10:00 AM window for each requested date.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternative options, leading to a long and unproductive exchange.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was highly inefficient as the agent repeatedly reported unavailability for the same time slot across multiple days without suggesting alternative times or proactively searching for available slots.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative times, leading to a repetitive and unproductive conversation where the user had to continuously propose new dates.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative times after multiple rejections of the same time slot significantly hampered the conversation's effectiveness and customer satisfaction.
